raw: {"metrics":{},"growth_trends":["Achieve a CPM ≤ $5 within the first week.","Generate at least 200 qualified leads or conversions within the 30‑day campaign.","Attain a ROAS (return on ad spend) of 3:1 by the end of the campaign.","Maintain ad frequency below 2.5 to avoid ad fatigue."],"recommendations":["Counter rising CPMs by focusing on low‑competition niche audiences and short‑form video placements.","Mitigate policy changes by pre‑approving ad creatives and maintaining compliance checklists.","Address limited data granularity by using AI‑driven predictive modeling and frequent micro‑adjustments.","Prevent ad fatigue by rotating creative assets every 48 hours and capping frequency.","Navigate regulatory scrutiny by adhering to data‑privacy best practices and using platform‑provided consent tools."]}

tasks_output.industry: Facebook Advertising for Small Budgets ($100 Campaigns)
tasks_output.market_size: $12.5 billion (global spend on low‑budget Facebook ad campaigns in 2023)
tasks_output.growth_rate: 8.3% CAGR (2024‑2029) for sub‑$500 daily spend campaigns on Facebook
top_companies: AdEspresso (by Hootsuite) – campaign automation for small budgets
WordStream – PPC management tools for low‑budget advertisers
Kenshoo (Skai) – cross‑channel ad optimization with $100‑budget support
Smartly.io – creative automation for micro‑spend campaigns
opportunities: AI‑driven audience segmentation enabling higher ROI at $100 spend levels
Growth of mobile‑first commerce driving demand for short‑burst ad bursts
Emergence of short‑form video formats (Reels, Stories) with lower CPMs
Integration of Shopify and other e‑commerce platforms simplifying ad creation for SMBs
Increasing availability of self‑serve analytics dashboards for micro‑budget tracking
risks: Rising CPMs due to competition from TikTok and Instagram Reels
Policy changes and ad‑approval delays affecting campaign launch speed
Limited data granularity at $100 spend, reducing optimization precision
Ad fatigue in niche audiences leading to diminishing returns quickly
Regulatory scrutiny on data privacy impacting targeting capabilities

tasks_output.strategic_objective: Launch a high‑impact Facebook ad campaign with a $100 budget that maximizes ROI by leveraging AI‑driven audience segmentation and short‑form video formats for SMB e‑commerce clients.
key_results: Achieve a CPM ≤ $5 within the first week.
Generate at least 200 qualified leads or conversions within the 30‑day campaign.
Attain a ROAS (return on ad spend) of 3:1 by the end of the campaign.
Maintain ad frequency below 2.5 to avoid ad fatigue.
tasks_output.timeline: Preparation (Week 1): audience research and creative development; Launch (Week 2): campaign go‑live; Optimization (Weeks 3‑4): AI‑driven adjustments and performance monitoring; Reporting (Week 5): final analysis and insights.
risk_mitigation: Counter rising CPMs by focusing on low‑competition niche audiences and short‑form video placements.
Mitigate policy changes by pre‑approving ad creatives and maintaining compliance checklists.
Address limited data granularity by using AI‑driven predictive modeling and frequent micro‑adjustments.
Prevent ad fatigue by rotating creative assets every 48 hours and capping frequency.
Navigate regulatory scrutiny by adhering to data‑privacy best practices and using platform‑provided consent tools.

growth_trends: Achieve a CPM ≤ $5 within the first week.
Generate at least 200 qualified leads or conversions within the 30‑day campaign.
Attain a ROAS (return on ad spend) of 3:1 by the end of the campaign.

recommendations: Counter rising CPMs by focusing on low‑competition niche audiences and short‑form video placements.
Mitigate policy changes by pre‑approving ad creatives and maintaining compliance checklists.
Address limited data granularity by using AI‑driven predictive modeling and frequent micro‑adjustments.
Prevent ad fatigue by rotating creative assets every 48 hours and capping frequency.
Navigate regulatory scrutiny by adhering to data‑privacy best practices and using platform‑provided consent tools.
